_README: Copy this file to appsettings.Local.json (gitignored) and fill in your local-dev values. NEVER commit appsettings.Local.json. For Railway/prod the same values come from env vars using the '__' nesting convention (Jwt__Key etc.). See SECRETS.md for the full matrix.
_DATABASE: Local dev runs PostgreSQL via the docker-compose.yml at repo root. Run `docker compose up -d` first; the default ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection in appsettings.json already matches that container. Only override below if you changed the docker-compose values or are running Postgres natively on a different port.

MaterialPurchases._README: Optional. Set TriggerLocationId to the Location.Id of the firm's 'Nákup materiálu' Location to activate the in-šichta combined kiosk flow. Leave null (or omit) to fall back to matching by Location name — works for fresh dev DBs where the seeded Location named 'Nákup materiálu' triggers automatically.

OpenRouteService._README: Optional. Sign up at openrouteservice.org for a free API key (2 000 directions/day). Without a key the Commander ride map falls back to a dashed straight line — no errors, just less detail.
